created.description: The timestamp of the MonetaryAccountJoint's creation.

updated.description: The timestamp of the MonetaryAccountJoint's last update.

currency.description: The currency of the MonetaryAccountJoint as an ISO 4217 formatted currency code.

description.description: The description of the MonetaryAccountJoint. Defaults to 'bunq account'.

daily_limit.description: The daily spending limit Amount of the MonetaryAccountJoint. Defaults to 1000 EUR. Currency must match the MonetaryAccountJoint's currency. Limited to 10000 EUR.

overdraft_limit.description: The maximum Amount the MonetaryAccountJoint can be 'in the red'.

balance.description: The current available balance Amount of the MonetaryAccountJoint.

status.description: The status of the MonetaryAccountJoint. Can be: ACTIVE, BLOCKED, CANCELLED or PENDING_REOPEN

sub_status.description: The sub-status of the MonetaryAccountJoint providing extra information regarding the status. Will be NONE for ACTIVE or PENDING_REOPEN, COMPLETELY or ONLY_ACCEPTING_INCOMING for BLOCKED and REDEMPTION_INVOLUNTARY, REDEMPTION_VOLUNTARY or PERMANENT for CANCELLED.

reason.description: The reason for voluntarily cancelling (closing) the MonetaryAccountJoint, can only be OTHER.

reason_description.description: The optional free-form reason for voluntarily cancelling (closing) the MonetaryAccountJoint. Can be any user provided message.

all_co_owner.description: The users the account will be joint with.

user_id.description: The id of the User who owns the MonetaryAccountJoint.
